notes: Runs very well, though with quite a low FPS.
title: Unworthy

notes: Runs extremely poorly, 10-15fps at best. Slows down whole computer.
title: Unworthy

notes: Out of the box, the game runs poorly. Unless the graphics settings are lowered to "Low" the game can run so poorly that too many inputs too quickly can cause a crash. Tweaking runtime options to disable D3D11 seemed to help just enough to prevent crashing long enough to get to gameplay, but not enough to make the game practically playable. Even with tweaks FPS is low - 10-15 normally, occasionally lower - and crashes are frequent enough that the game can be described, at best, as "technically" playable.
title: Unworthy
